test_cases.title: Verify revive system works in normal battle royale flow
test_cases.expected_result: revive system should work correctly during normal battle royale gameplay.

test_cases.title: Verify revive system handles invalid or unexpected player actions
test_cases.expected_result: revive system should fail safely without crashes or broken gameplay.

test_cases.title: Verify revive system remains stable during final-circle pressure
test_cases.expected_result: revive system should remain stable and responsive during high-pressure endgame conditions.
